explanationZhTw: 嘆息；這裡指帶著疲憊或無奈的呼氣聲，不是普通的「呼吸」而是情緒性的聲音。
generatedExample: She let out a long sigh after reading the message.

explanationZhTw: 接近、靠近；這裡強調「就在旁邊、距離很近」的狀態。
generatedExample: The nearness of the station made the apartment convenient.

explanationZhTw: 發出；這裡不是「說出完整話語」，而是指他不自覺地發出一聲嘆息。
generatedExample: He was barely uttering a word when the phone rang.

explanationZhTw: 虛構的裝置名稱，結合 speak 和 write，表示可用口述或輸入來寫字的機器。
generatedExample: In the story, the speakwrite recorded every order he dictated.

explanationZhTw: 嘴對著說話或吹氣的部件；這裡指機器上供使用者對著操作的開口。
generatedExample: He wiped the mouthpiece before speaking into the device.

explanationZhTw: 眼鏡；這是比較正式或舊式的說法。
generatedExample: He cleaned his spectacles with a soft cloth.

explanationZhTw: 用夾子夾在一起；表示把幾張東西固定成一疊。
generatedExample: She clipped together the notes before handing them in.

explanationZhTw: 掉出來、滑出來；這裡帶有鬆散、沒力地落出的感覺。
generatedExample: The papers flopped out of the folder when he opened it.

explanationZhTw: 氣動管道；利用空氣壓力在建築內運送紙張或小物件的管子。
generatedExample: The office sent the form through a pneumatic tube.

explanationZhTw: 右側；這裡只是空間位置說明。
generatedExample: The button is on the right-hand side of the screen.

explanationZhTw: cubicle 指「隔間／小工作間」，這裡是在描述一個被分隔開的小空間。
generatedExample: She worked in a quiet cubicle near the window.

explanationZhTw: orifices 指「孔、開口、孔洞」，是較正式或技術性的說法。
generatedExample: The device has two tiny orifices for releasing steam.

explanationZhTw: pneumatic tube 指「氣動輸送管」，用空氣壓力把信件或文件送走，是較專門的詞。
generatedExample: The old bank still used a pneumatic tube to send documents between floors.

explanationZhTw: slit 指「狹縫、長而窄的開口」。
generatedExample: He slipped the note through the slit in the door.

explanationZhTw: wire grating 指「鐵絲柵格／金屬格柵」，用來遮擋、保護或通風。
generatedExample: A wire grating covered the opening to keep people out.

explanationZhTw: disposal 在這裡是「處理、丟棄」，不是一般的「處置權」或法律用法。
generatedExample: The disposal of electronic waste is tightly regulated.

explanationZhTw: waste paper 指「廢紙、不要的紙張」。
generatedExample: Please put all waste paper in the recycling bin.

explanationZhTw: intervals 指「間隔、每隔一段距離／時間」。這裡是空間上的間隔。
generatedExample: The buses run at regular intervals during the morning rush.

explanationZhTw: nicknamed 是「給……起綽號／別名」。
generatedExample: The tall boy was nicknamed "Stretch" by his classmates.

explanationZhTw: memory holes 是文中的特殊說法，字面像「記憶洞」，實際上指把文件丟進去後讓它消失的地方，帶有諷刺意味。
generatedExample: In the novel, the records seemed to vanish into memory holes.

explanationZhTw: scrap 指「小片、碎片」，這裡是很小的一張紙片。
generatedExample: She found a scrap of paper with a phone number on it.

explanationZhTw: drop it in 是片語動詞，意思是「把它投進去／丟進去」。
generatedExample: He dropped the letter in and closed the box.

explanationZhTw: whereupon 是較正式的連接詞，意思接近「於是、然後、接著就」。
generatedExample: She signed the form, whereupon the clerk filed it away.

explanationZhTw: whirled away 表示「被快速旋轉帶走／捲走」，這裡強調紙張被氣流迅速送走。
generatedExample: The leaves were whirled away by the strong wind.

explanationZhTw: recesses 指「深處、隱蔽的角落／內部深處」，不是一般的凹陷而已。
generatedExample: The file was buried in the recesses of the archive.

explanationZhTw: 仔細查看、檢視；這裡表示溫斯頓認真讀那幾張紙條。
generatedExample: She examined the note before replying.

explanationZhTw: 把捲起來的東西攤開；這裡指把紙條展開來看。
generatedExample: He unrolled the map on the table.

explanationZhTw: 縮寫的、簡化的；這裡表示用字很精簡，不是完整正式的表達。
generatedExample: The report was written in abbreviated form.

explanationZhTw: 行話、術語；指某個團體或專業內部才常用的特定用語。
generatedExample: The manual is full of technical jargon.

explanationZhTw: 主要由...組成；這裡表示大部分內容都是某種詞彙。
generatedExample: The class was consisting largely of new students.

explanationZhTw: 內部用途；指只供組織內部使用，不對外公開。
generatedExample: This document is for internal purposes only.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 ran 不是「跑」，而是指「內容如下／寫著這些」的意思。
generatedExample: The notice ran: "Office closed on Friday."

explanationZhTw: 這裡是「演說、講話」的意思。屬於基礎常用詞，但在這種簡短片段中需要注意它指的是口頭發言，而不是「說話能力」或其他延伸義。
generatedExample: Her speech impressed everyone in the room.

explanationZhTw: 在這裡是「報導錯誤、誤報」的意思。這不是日常最常見的用法，但可從前綴 `mal-`（錯誤、不良）和 `reported` 看出語意。
generatedExample: The incident was malreported in the first draft of the article.

explanationZhTw: 意思是「糾正、修正」。這是正式用語，常用在要把錯誤改正過來的情境。
generatedExample: We need to rectify the mistake before the report is sent.

explanationZhTw: 在這裡是「預測、預報」的意思，指對未來情況做出估計或判斷。
generatedExample: The weather forecasts say it will rain tomorrow.

explanationZhTw: 指「印刷錯誤、誤植」，通常用在出版品或文件裡。
generatedExample: The editor fixed several misprints before the book was printed.

explanationZhTw: 意思是「核實、確認」，強調檢查資訊是否正確。
generatedExample: Please verify the booking details before you travel.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 issue 不是「問題」，而是指「期號、當期刊物／最新一期」，屬於語境上的特殊用法。
generatedExample: I found the article in the current issue of the magazine.

explanationZhTw: 這裡較可能是報紙名稱《The Times》，不是一般的「多次／時代」意思。
generatedExample: I read about the election in The Times this morning.

explanationZhTw: 《1984》中的新語詞，指「充裕部」這個帶有反諷色彩的政府部門名稱。
generatedExample: Miniplenty announced another cut in food rations.

explanationZhTw: 指「引用錯誤、誤引」；這是由前綴 mal- 組成的罕見詞。
generatedExample: The passage was malquoted in the newsletter, so we corrected it.

explanationZhTw: 意思是「修正、糾正」；在這裡屬於較正式的用法。
generatedExample: We need to rectify the mistake before sending the file.

explanationZhTw: 這裡是 `Big Brother` 的縮寫，指老大哥或最高權威。
generatedExample: BB was mentioned in every broadcast.

explanationZhTw: 這裡指一天的工作安排、命令順序或當日處置事項。
generatedExample: The dayorder was posted on the office board.

explanationZhTw: Newspeak 的強化說法，表示「非常糟、極差」。
generatedExample: The result was doubleplusungood for the team.

explanationZhTw: 這裡是 `references` 的縮寫，指參照資料、引用或註記。
generatedExample: Please check the refs before you submit the paper.

explanationZhTw: 指被政權抹除的人，連姓名和紀錄都被消除。
generatedExample: After the purge, several officials became unpersons.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是一般的「重寫」，而是按官方版本重新改寫內容。
generatedExample: They had to rewrite the report to fit the official narrative.

explanationZhTw: 表示「完整地、全部地」，強調沒有省略。
generatedExample: Please explain the process fullwise.

explanationZhTw: 指向上級提交、往上呈交文件或資料。
generatedExample: The clerk will upsub the file this afternoon.

explanationZhTw: 指事先歸檔、預先建檔。
generatedExample: Antefiling the documents made later review easier.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `lay ... aside` 表示把某物先放到一邊、暫時不處理。
generatedExample: She laid the report aside and answered the phone first.

explanationZhTw: `intricate` 指「複雜而精細的」，通常表示細節很多、不容易處理。
generatedExample: The watch has an intricate design with many tiny parts.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `responsible` 不只是「負責的」，而是指這件事很重要、需要小心處理，不能出錯。
generatedExample: This is a responsible task because one mistake could affect everyone.

explanationZhTw: `deal with` 表示「處理、應付」。
generatedExample: We need to deal with this problem before lunch.

explanationZhTw: `routine matters` 指例行、普通、不特別的事情。
generatedExample: Checking emails is just routine work for her.

explanationZhTw: `tedious` 指因為單調、耗時而令人厭煩的。
generatedExample: Sorting these receipts is a tedious job.

explanationZhTw: `wade through` 在這裡是比喻用法，表示費力地慢慢閱讀或處理大量內容。
generatedExample: I spent the morning wading through a stack of old forms.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `figures` 不是「人物」，而是「數字、數據」。
generatedExample: The chart shows the sales figures for last quarter.

explanationZhTw: 指「舊期刊／舊報紙號」，這裡是要調出過期的《泰晤士報》；不是一般的「後面的數字」。
generatedExample: I found a stack of back numbers in the archive room.

explanationZhTw: 《一九八四》裡的監視裝置，兼具螢幕與監聽功能；可理解為「電視監視器／監視螢幕」。
generatedExample: The telescreen in the room never seemed to be switched off.

explanationZhTw: 「氣動管」或「氣壓輸送管」，用來快速傳送文件或物品。
generatedExample: The forms were sent through a pneumatic tube to the other floor.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是一般的「修正」而已，而是指把舊報導或數據改成符合官方新說法的內容，帶有官僚、政治修辭意味。
generatedExample: The editor was told to rectify the report before it went to print.

explanationZhTw: 「消費品」，也就是供日常使用、被消耗的商品。
generatedExample: The factory increased production of consumption goods last year.

explanationZhTw: `grossly` 這裡是「非常、嚴重地」；`grossly wrong` 就是「錯得很離譜／大錯特錯」。
generatedExample: The initial estimate was grossly wrong, so we had to redo the calculation.

explanationZhTw: 片語動詞，意思是「修正、改正、把問題弄好」。
generatedExample: We can set this right before the meeting starts.

explanationZhTw: 指「絕對明確、不容含糊的承諾」；這裡是官方用語，語氣很強硬。
generatedExample: They made a categorical pledge to finish the work on time.

explanationZhTw: 「配給量／定量」，指被限制分配的食物或物資數量。
generatedExample: Each family received a weekly ration of sugar.

explanationZhTw: 「had dealt with」在這裡是「處理完、應付完」的意思，表示溫斯頓已經把每則訊息都處理好了。
generatedExample: After she had dealt with the emails, she finally took a break.

explanationZhTw: 「appropriate」在這裡是「相對應的、正確的」；不是「適當的」那麼抽象，而是指要放到對的那一份報紙版本。
generatedExample: Please send the form to the appropriate office.

explanationZhTw: 「pneumatic tube」是以氣壓傳送文件的小管道，屬於特定技術名詞。
generatedExample: The hospital used a pneumatic tube to send samples to the lab.

explanationZhTw: 這裡是在強調他的動作幾乎是無意識地完成的，表示習慣化到不需要思考。
generatedExample: With a movement that was almost unconscious, he reached for his phone.

explanationZhTw: 「crumple up」是把紙張揉皺、揉成一團。
generatedExample: He crumpled up the receipt and threw it away.

explanationZhTw: 「memory hole」在《1984》裡是虛構概念，指把不想留下的文件丟進去銷毀的地方，帶有政治控制的特殊含義。
generatedExample: The report was sent to the memory hole and never seen again.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的「devoured」不是字面上的「吞吃食物」，而是生動地表示文件被火焰吞沒、燒毀。
generatedExample: The old letters were devoured by the flames in seconds.

explanationZhTw: 「collated」在這裡指把多份資料核對、彙整成一致版本。
generatedExample: The editor assembled and collated the reports before publication.

explanationZhTw: 表示「取而代之」；是較正式、書面語的說法。
generatedExample: A new policy was introduced in its stead.

explanationZhTw: 指「更新到最新狀態」；這裡特別用來形容連過去記錄都被改寫成最新版本。
generatedExample: We brought the database up to date this morning.

explanationZhTw: 意思是「被保留在正式紀錄中」；在這裡暗示任何不利內容都不會被留下。
generatedExample: The complaint was allowed to remain on record.

explanationZhTw: 原指被刮除後再寫字的羊皮紙；這裡比喻歷史不斷被覆寫。
generatedExample: To the archivist, the document was a palimpsest of earlier edits.

explanationZhTw: 指「被更新取代、失去效力」；常用於舊版本、舊規定或舊設備。
generatedExample: The old form has been superseded by a simpler online version.

explanationZhTw: 指「把……丟掉／處理掉」；是很常見的口語片語動詞。
generatedExample: I got rid of the old files yesterday.

explanationZhTw: 意思是「改正、修正」；這裡指把錯誤改到正確為止。
generatedExample: We need to put right the mistake before sending the letter.

explanationZhTw: 在這裡指偽造、假造的行為或東西；說話者認為這種改動已不只是偽造，而是更空洞的拼湊。
generatedExample: The signature on the contract was a forgery.

explanationZhTw: 「替換、代換」；這裡是把一個荒謬內容換成另一個荒謬內容。
generatedExample: The substitution of sugar with honey changed the flavor.

explanationZhTw: 憑空編造；不是根據真實資料，而是自己想出來。
generatedExample: She made up an excuse for missing the meeting.

explanationZhTw: 預測、預估；這裡是對產量的官方預測。
generatedExample: The weather forecast says it will rain tomorrow.

explanationZhTw: 產量；某段時間內生產出來的數量。
generatedExample: Factory output increased after the new machines arrived.

explanationZhTw: 把數字往下調；這裡是刻意把預測值改低。
generatedExample: The analyst marked the estimate down to stay conservative.

explanationZhTw: 把某種情況考慮進去；預先留出空間或餘地。
generatedExample: We should allow for traffic delays when planning the trip.

explanationZhTw: 配額；規定必須達到或不得超過的數量。
generatedExample: The team has a monthly sales quota to meet.

explanationZhTw: 離真相還是一樣遠；表示幾個說法都同樣不真實。
generatedExample: His explanation was no nearer the truth than the first story.

explanationZhTw: 字面是「天文數字」，實際上表示極其龐大、誇張的數量。
generatedExample: The campaign spent astronomical numbers of dollars on ads.

explanationZhTw: 赤腳走路；這裡暗示連鞋子都沒有，生活非常匱乏。
generatedExample: The children went barefoot on the beach.

explanationZhTw: 逐漸消失；不再明顯或不再重要。
generatedExample: The music faded away as we left the hall.

explanationZhTw: 字面是「影子世界」，這裡指與現實脫節、虛假而模糊的世界。
generatedExample: He felt trapped in a shadow-world of rumors and lies.

explanationZhTw: 在這裡指「相對應的、對面的」；不是「回覆的」，而是說另一側那個隔間的位置對稱相對。
generatedExample: She sat in the corresponding seat on the other side of the aisle.

explanationZhTw: 表示「持續而穩定地做事、一直埋頭工作」；這裡強調他沒有停下來。
generatedExample: He kept working steadily away until the job was done.

explanationZhTw: 此處是裝置的「話筒、嘴邊的受話器」；不是一般說的「代言人」。
generatedExample: He leaned toward the mouthpiece and spoke softly.

explanationZhTw: 固定說法，表示「看起來像、彷彿」；用來描述某種感覺或姿態。
generatedExample: She had the air of someone who knew the answer already.

explanationZhTw: 這是比喻性的寫法，形容他抬眼時透出敵意的目光；不是字面上的「真的閃光」。
generatedExample: Her eyes darted a hostile flash at the reporter.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `readily` 不是「很快地」，而是「輕易地、願意地」；整句表示他們不太願意談自己的工作。
generatedExample: She did not readily agree to the new rules.

explanationZhTw: 表示「來回地、往返地」；這裡在描述人們在走廊中不斷往返走動。
generatedExample: The children ran to and fro across the yard.

explanationZhTw: 表示「日日如此、天天重複」；強調長時間持續不變。
generatedExample: He answered emails day in day out.

explanationZhTw: 表示「追查、找出」；這裡是指費力找出並確認那些名字。
generatedExample: The detective spent hours tracking down the suspect.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是字面上的「蒸發」，而是指人被政權徹底消滅、抹去到像從未存在過。
generatedExample: In the story, anyone who disagreed could be vaporized from history.

explanationZhTw: 表示「左右、大約」；用來說明人數差不多五十人。
generatedExample: We left at 8:00 or thereabouts.

explanationZhTw: 表示「制定、訂下」；這裡指高層制定政策方向。
generatedExample: The committee laid down clear rules for everyone.

explanationZhTw: 表示「徹底抹除、消滅」；帶有強烈的比喻意味。
generatedExample: The old shop was almost rubbed out of existence by new development.

explanationZhTw: 「重建過去」在這裡不是單純修復歷史，而是指把歷史資料重新編寫、塑造成當權者想要的樣子。
generatedExample: The archivist said the regime was trying to reconstruct the past instead of preserve it.

explanationZhTw: 「conceivable」表示「能想像的、可能的」。這裡強調資訊種類多到任何能想到的都包含在內。
generatedExample: They searched every conceivable place for the missing report.

explanationZhTw: 「multifarious」是正式用語，意思是「各式各樣的、繁多的」。
generatedExample: The museum serves the multifarious needs of students, tourists, and researchers.

explanationZhTw: 「proletariat」指「無產階級、勞工階層」。在這裡是政治語境中的社會階級名稱。
generatedExample: The novel focuses on how the proletariat is treated under the new system.

explanationZhTw: 「deal with」是片語動詞，意思是「處理、負責、專門應對」。這裡指各部門分工負責不同類型的文藝工作。
generatedExample: My team is dealing with customer complaints this week.

explanationZhTw: 「rubbishy」表示「劣質的、沒價值的、低俗的」。
generatedExample: He spent money on a rubbishy gadget that broke the next day.

explanationZhTw: 「sensational」在這裡不是單純「很棒」，而是「耸動的、以誇張方式吸引注意的」。
generatedExample: The headline used sensational language to sell more copies.

explanationZhTw: 「novelettes」是「短篇通俗小說、小小說」，通常帶有輕薄或俗麗的意味。
generatedExample: She bought a stack of airport novelettes for the flight.

explanationZhTw: 「oozing with」是比喻用法，表示「充滿、洋溢著」，常帶有過度、令人不舒服的感覺。
generatedExample: The ad was oozing with nostalgia.

explanationZhTw: 「by mechanical means」表示「靠機械方式、由機器完成」，這裡暗示歌曲不是人工創作，而是機械生成。
generatedExample: The parts were assembled by mechanical means on the factory line.

explanationZhTw: 「versificator」是文中虛構的器材名稱，指一種自動產生詩句或歌詞的機器。
generatedExample: The novel imagines a versificator that can write poems in seconds.

explanationZhTw: 「Pornosec」是作者虛構的 Newspeak 詞彙，指專門製作色情內容的部門。
generatedExample: The satire invents a department called Pornosec to mock censorship and propaganda.

explanationZhTw: 以氣壓傳送文件的管道；這裡是小說中的辦公通訊設備。
generatedExample: The memo arrived through the pneumatic tube in a few seconds.

explanationZhTw: 這裡表示「處理完、解決掉」，不是字面上的「丟棄」。
generatedExample: She disposed of the paperwork before leaving the office.

explanationZhTw: 本書中的固定政治儀式名稱，屬於小說專有用語，不能直譯成一般日常表達。
generatedExample: In the novel, the crowd gathers for the Two Minutes Hate every day.

explanationZhTw: 小隔間、工作位；這裡指辦公室裡狹小的個人工作空間。
generatedExample: He sat in his cubicle and started answering emails.

explanationZhTw: 《一九八四》中的虛構語言名稱，用來控制人們的思考方式。
generatedExample: The dictator introduced Newspeak to limit what people could say.

explanationZhTw: 小說裡的裝置名稱，意思接近「會把說出的話轉成文字的機器」。
generatedExample: He dictated the letter into the speakwrite.

explanationZhTw: 眼鏡；這裡是較正式、偏文學的說法。
generatedExample: She took off her spectacles before reading the note.

explanationZhTw: 安頓下來、開始專心做某事；這裡表示準備投入工作。
generatedExample: After breakfast, he settled down to study for the exam.

explanationZhTw: 乏味的例行工作；`tedious` 表示很無聊、拖沓，`routine` 指固定重複的工作或流程。
generatedExample: My daily commute has become a tedious routine.

explanationZhTw: 複雜而精細，通常表示細節很多、很難處理。
generatedExample: The watch had an intricate mechanism inside.

explanationZhTw: 全神貫注於某事；完全沉浸在其中。
generatedExample: She can lose herself in painting for hours.

explanationZhTw: 偽造品；這裡指被偽造的文字或文件。
generatedExample: The police discovered a forgery in the museum archive.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是單純的「估算」，而是「判斷／揣測」黨方想要你說什麼。
generatedExample: I can only estimate what the manager will decide.

explanationZhTw: 被委託負責；表示把任務交給某人處理。
generatedExample: She was entrusted with the keys to the office.

explanationZhTw: 更正、修正；是較正式的用語，指把錯誤內容改對。
generatedExample: The team completed the rectification before publication.

explanationZhTw: 在報業語境中指社論，不是字面上的「主要文章」。
generatedExample: The newspaper's leading articles often shaped public opinion.

explanationZhTw: 先放一旁、暫時留著；這裡指先保留起來之後再看。
generatedExample: I set aside some money for emergencies.

explanationZhTw: 這裡是「寫著／內容是」的意思，不是「跑」。
generatedExample: The notice ran: 'Meeting postponed until Friday.'

explanationZhTw: 在這裡是「報告、彙報」的意思；也可理解為用來呈報資訊的用語。
generatedExample: The reporting was sent to headquarters before lunch.

explanationZhTw: 這個合成詞可理解為「當天要處理的事項／今日優先順序」。
generatedExample: The dayorder changed after the morning briefing.

explanationZhTw: 這是《1984》式的誇張說法，意思是「非常糟、糟到不能再糟」。
generatedExample: Missing the deadline was doubleplusungood for his record.

explanationZhTw: `references` 的縮寫，指「參考資料」或「提到的條目」。
generatedExample: Please check the refs before you submit the draft.

explanationZhTw: 在《1984》裡指被政權抹除的人，彷彿從未存在過。
generatedExample: The regime treated the dissidents as unpersons.

explanationZhTw: 「重寫、改寫」；在這種語境下也可能帶有官方修訂內容的意思。
generatedExample: She had to rewrite the memo after the policy changed.

explanationZhTw: 這個副詞可理解為「完全地、徹底地」；是帶有新聞話語風格的構詞。
generatedExample: He agreed fullwise with the proposal.

explanationZhTw: 看起來是「向上呈交／上報」一類的縮寫式用法，指把文件送交上層。
generatedExample: The clerk made an upsub to the supervisor after the call.

explanationZhTw: 可理解為「事先歸檔、預先存檔」；`ante-` 表示「在前、在……之前」。
generatedExample: They finished the antefiling before the audit began.

explanationZhTw: 指《一九八四》中對「舊式英語」的虛構稱呼，也就是與黨的「新語」相對的傳統英文。
generatedExample: In Oldspeak, the phrase would sound normal, but in Newspeak it would be simplified.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 rendered 不是「呈現」的字面動作，而是指「表述、改寫成文字或語句」。
generatedExample: The poem was rendered in plain English for younger readers.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是一般的「訂單」或「命令」，而是指當天正式發布的指示／命令，帶有官樣和政治語氣。
generatedExample: The commander issued the order for the day before breakfast.

explanationZhTw: 意思是「不夠好、令人不滿意」，常用來表示品質或結果未達要求。
generatedExample: The first report was unsatisfactory, so I wrote it again.

explanationZhTw: 這裡是「提到、涉及」的意思，不是「參考書目」那種正式引用的意思。
generatedExample: The article references several recent events.

explanationZhTw: 表示「不存在的、虛構的」，用來強調被提到的人根本沒有其人。
generatedExample: They invented a non-existent company to hide the money trail.

explanationZhTw: 意思是「提交、呈交」，常用於把文件送交審核或批准。
generatedExample: Please submit your application by Friday.

explanationZhTw: 指「草稿、初稿」，也就是尚未定稿的版本。
generatedExample: Please send me your draft before noon.

explanationZhTw: 這裡指「上級主管／更高層級的機關」，不是字面上的抽象「更高權威」而已。
generatedExample: You need approval from a higher authority before making that change.

explanationZhTw: 這裡是「歸檔、正式存檔」的意思，屬於公文或行政流程用語。
generatedExample: Make sure the document is ready for filing after it is approved.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 offending 不是單純「冒犯的」，而是指「惹人反感、讓人不舒服的」；整個片語指那篇讓人不滿的文章。
generatedExample: She refused to comment on the offending article.

explanationZhTw: 這裡是慣用說法，指「今天的重點／主題」，不是字面上的命令。
generatedExample: The order for the day is to finish the report before lunch.

explanationZhTw: chiefly 表示「主要地；大多是」。
generatedExample: The meeting was chiefly about budget cuts.

explanationZhTw: organization 指「組織、機構、團體」。
generatedExample: Our organization helps families find temporary housing.

explanationZhTw: supplied 在這裡是「提供、供應」的意思。
generatedExample: The warehouse supplied food to the shelter.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 comforts 不是「安慰」本身，而是指「讓人舒服的小享受、生活用品」。
generatedExample: The room had basic comforts like a bed and hot water.

explanationZhTw: sailors 指「水手；船員」。
generatedExample: The sailors returned to port after three months at sea.

explanationZhTw: 這是作品中的特殊名詞，字面像「漂浮的堡壘」，實際上指巨大的海上軍事設施。
generatedExample: The story described huge Floating Fortresses patrolling the sea.

explanationZhTw: prominent 表示「著名的；重要的；突出的」。
generatedExample: She is a prominent scientist in the field of medicine.

explanationZhTw: singled out 是片語動詞，意思是「特別挑出來；單獨點名」。
generatedExample: The teacher singled out two students for praise.

explanationZhTw: awarded 表示「授予；頒給」。
generatedExample: She was awarded a prize for her research.

explanationZhTw: decoration 在這裡不是「裝飾」，而是指「勳章；榮譽獎章」。
generatedExample: He received a military decoration for bravery.

explanationZhTw: 在這裡指「解散、撤銷」，不是指液體的「溶解」。
generatedExample: The committee was dissolved after the scandal.

explanationZhTw: 指因丟臉、失勢或醜聞而聲名受損。
generatedExample: After the failed launch, he left the company in disgrace.

explanationZhTw: 本作中的特定名詞，指兼具螢幕與監視功能的裝置。
generatedExample: She kept her notes away from the telescreen.

explanationZhTw: 指被公開譴責、指控或羞辱。
generatedExample: The activist was publicly denounced by the minister.

explanationZhTw: 政治清洗，指系統性地清除被視為威脅的人。
generatedExample: The regime launched purges to remove its rivals.

explanationZhTw: 這裡指供宣傳或展示用的「樣板事件」，不是普通的表演。
generatedExample: The trial was staged as a show-piece for propaganda.

explanationZhTw: 指「惹怒／冒犯了」某個權威，因而招致不滿或懲罰。
generatedExample: Anyone who incurred the boss's displeasure was reassigned.

explanationZhTw: 表示從此再也沒有消息、音訊全無。
generatedExample: After the arrest, the witnesses were never heard of again.

explanationZhTw: cubicle 指「小隔間」或「辦公室裡的格子間」，這裡是指 Tillotson 的工作小空間。
generatedExample: She kept her files in the cubicle beside her desk.

explanationZhTw: crouching 是「蹲著、彎低身體」的意思。
generatedExample: The cat was crouching behind the sofa.

explanationZhTw: secretively 表示「偷偷地、帶著保密的方式」，強調做事不想讓別人知道。
generatedExample: He secretively checked his notes under the table.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 spectacle-flash 是很特殊的用法，指「眼鏡片反射出的閃光」；hostile 則讓這道閃光帶有敵意、威脅的感覺。
generatedExample: A hostile spectacle-flash caught my eye from across the room.

explanationZhTw: engaged on 在這裡表示「正在做、忙於處理」某項工作。
generatedExample: She is engaged on a new translation project this month.

explanationZhTw: tricky 在這裡是「棘手的、難處理的」；也可帶有「狡猾的」意思。
generatedExample: This is a tricky question, but we can handle it.

explanationZhTw: entrusted 表示「託付、委託」，把責任或物品交給某人保管或處理。
generatedExample: The manager entrusted the keys to the night guard.

explanationZhTw: fabrication 在這裡不是「製造」的字面義，而是「捏造、編造」的意思，指虛假的說法或內容。
generatedExample: His alibi turned out to be a complete fabrication.

explanationZhTw: working away 表示「持續不停地工作」；away 在這裡加強持續進行的感覺。
generatedExample: They were working away on the report until late at night.

explanationZhTw: set in motion 是「啟動、使開始運作」的意思，常用來表示讓一連串事情開始發生。
generatedExample: Her phone call set in motion a series of urgent meetings.

explanationZhTw: cross-referencing 指「交叉比對、互相參照」，也就是把不同資料對照來確認內容。
generatedExample: We spent the afternoon cross-referencing the citations.

explanationZhTw: 被貶黜、蒙羞；在政治語境中也可指被剝奪地位與名聲。
generatedExample: She was disgraced after the scandal became public.

explanationZhTw: 不稱職；指做事能力不足，無法勝任工作。
generatedExample: His incompetence cost the team several weeks.

explanationZhTw: 下屬；職位較低、受上級管轄的人。
generatedExample: A subordinate should be able to ask questions without fear.

explanationZhTw: 在此是極權政治的委婉說法，指清洗、消失與秘密處決。
generatedExample: These purges and vaporizations were meant to erase dissent.

explanationZhTw: 一貫地、始終如此，幾乎沒有例外。
generatedExample: The system invariably crashed after midnight.

explanationZhTw: 在此不是抽象的「自由」，而是「暫時未被拘押、可自由行動」。
generatedExample: The suspect was kept at liberty until trial.

explanationZhTw: 像鬼一樣的再現；此處帶有令人毛骨悚然的「突然再次出現」感。
generatedExample: The old witness made a ghostly reappearance at the hearing.

explanationZhTw: 牽連、指證某人涉案。
generatedExample: The receipts could implicate everyone involved.

explanationZhTw: 證詞；在法庭或公開審判中所作的陳述。
generatedExample: Her testimony changed the verdict.

explanationZhTw: 極權語境中的「被抹除的人」，彷彿從未存在過。
generatedExample: He became an UNPERSON after the regime removed every record of him.

explanationZhTw: 在這裡是「涉及、處理」，比日常「應付」更偏向讓內容談論某主題。
generatedExample: The article will deal with the causes of inflation.

explanationZhTw: 「譴責；公開抨擊」；這裡指用正式或政治性的語氣大力批評某人或某事。
generatedExample: The report became a denunciation of unsafe factory conditions.

explanationZhTw: 「叛徒」；指背叛自己國家、團體或理念的人。
generatedExample: The guard accused the spy of being a traitor.

explanationZhTw: 「思想犯罪者」；這是極權語境中的造詞，指因思想或言論違規而被當成罪犯的人。
generatedExample: In the novel, people can be punished as thought-criminals for private doubts.

explanationZhTw: 「明顯的；顯而易見的」；這裡表示那樣寫法太容易被看穿。
generatedExample: It was obvious that they had planned the trip together.

explanationZhTw: 「編造；杜撰」；這裡不是「發明」器物，而是捏造一個假的事件。
generatedExample: She invented a story to explain why she was late.

explanationZhTw: 「勝利；大成功」；在這裡指被捏造出來的戰果或成就。
generatedExample: Their triumph in the final surprised everyone.

explanationZhTw: 「過度生產」；指生產量超過需要或計畫的數量。
generatedExample: The company cut costs after years of over-production.

explanationZhTw: 「使複雜；使更難處理」；這裡指會讓文件或紀錄變得更難維持一致。
generatedExample: Adding extra rules will only complicate the process.

explanationZhTw: 「紀錄；檔案」；此處不是一般「唱片」或「記錄」的日常用法，而是指官方文件中的紀錄。
generatedExample: The records showed that he had never been there.

explanationZhTw: 「純屬虛構／憑空捏造」；表示完全是假的、沒有真實基礎的內容。
generatedExample: The rumor was pure fantasy, with no evidence at all.

explanationZhTw: 「突然浮現在他腦海中」；是固定表達，表示某個想法或影像忽然出現。
generatedExample: The answer sprang into his mind after a few seconds.

explanationZhTw: 「專門用於；投入於」；這裡指把某段內容專門拿來做某件事。
generatedExample: She devoted the weekend to finishing her project.

explanationZhTw: 「紀念；追念」；用於正式地向某人或某事表示紀念。
generatedExample: The ceremony was commemorating the town's founders.

explanationZhTw: 「普通成員；基層人員」；指不是領導層、而是一般成員。
generatedExample: The rank-and-file members wanted a clear explanation.

explanationZhTw: 「把……樹立為榜樣」；這裡是固定說法，表示把某人當成可供模仿的正面例子。
generatedExample: The teacher held up her student as an example of perseverance.

explanationZhTw: 「偽造的；假的」；用來形容不是原本真實拍攝或製作出來的東西。
generatedExample: The police found faked documents in the drawer.

explanationZhTw: 「使他『被創造出來』；讓他憑空出現」；這裡指透過文字和照片把一個不存在的人塑造成看似真實。
generatedExample: The legend brought the hero into existence in people's imagination.

explanationZhTw: 這是小說中的虛構裝置，意思接近「語音打字機／口述輸入機」；這裡不是一般的 write，而是把說話直接轉成文字的機器。
generatedExample: He placed the note into the speakwrite and read out the message.

explanationZhTw: 指「口述讓別人或機器記錄下來」；在這裡是 Winston 對著裝置講話，由它把內容寫成文字。
generatedExample: She spent the afternoon dictating her report to an assistant.

explanationZhTw: 形容人或語氣「過度講究細節、愛挑毛病、教條味很重」；這裡是在說那種文風很死板、很愛說教。
generatedExample: His pedantic explanation annoyed everyone in the room.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 trick 不是「騙術」，而是「巧妙的手法／招數」；整句意思是「靠一個提問後立刻自答的技巧」。
generatedExample: The speaker used a trick of asking questions to keep the audience engaged.

explanationZhTw: 意思是「立刻、馬上」；這裡強調問題一問完就立刻回答，速度很快。
generatedExample: The driver promptly apologized after the mistake.

explanationZhTw: 意思是「模仿」；這裡是說這種說話方式很容易被學起來、照著做。
generatedExample: Children often imitate the tone of the adults around them.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `relaxation` 不是「放鬆、休息」，而是「放寬、鬆綁規定」；整句在說規則被特別放寬。
generatedExample: The school made a special relaxation of the rules for the final exam.

explanationZhTw: `denounce` 是「檢舉、告發」的意思，通常帶有強烈負面語氣，表示把某人交給當局處理。
generatedExample: She denounced the fraud to the police.

explanationZhTw: 這是軍事或官方語氣的委婉說法，意思是「在作戰中死亡」或「陣亡」。
generatedExample: My great-grandfather perished in action during the war.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `weighted` 不是一般的「稱重」，而是「加上重量、讓身體變重」以便跳下去後快速沉入水中。
generatedExample: He weighted his backpack so it would not float away in the river.

explanationZhTw: `single-mindedness` 指「專注一致、目標單一」的態度，強調只朝一個方向努力。
generatedExample: Her single-mindedness helped her finish the project on time.

explanationZhTw: `total abstainer` 指完全戒除某種習慣的人，這裡通常是指完全不喝酒。
generatedExample: As a total abstainer, he never drinks alcohol at parties.

explanationZhTw: `vow of celibacy` 是「獨身誓言」，表示立誓不結婚或不發生性關係。
generatedExample: The monk took a vow of celibacy when he entered the monastery.

explanationZhTw: `incompatible with` 表示「與……不相容、無法同時成立」；這裡是說婚姻與全天候盡責被視為不能並存。
generatedExample: Long working hours are incompatible with a healthy family life.

explanationZhTw: `hunt down` 是片語動詞，意思是「追捕、搜捕、費力找出並捉到」。
generatedExample: The investigators spent months hunting down the source of the leak.

explanationZhTw: `award` 在這裡是「頒發、授予」的意思，指把獎章或榮譽給某人，不是一般「獎品」本身。
generatedExample: The committee decided to award her the top prize.

explanationZhTw: `in the end` 是慣用語，意思是「最後、終究、結果」，用來表示一連串考慮後的最終結果。
generatedExample: In the end, we chose the simpler option.

explanationZhTw: `decided against` 表示「決定不做、決定反對」，後面接要否決的事情。
generatedExample: She decided against buying a new phone.

explanationZhTw: `cross-referencing` 在這裡指「交叉查對、互相對照索引資料」；屬於文書或編輯流程中的技術性用法。
generatedExample: The editor spent hours cross-referencing names and dates.

explanationZhTw: 「glance at」表示快速看一眼，這裡指他再次瞥向對面的競爭者。
generatedExample: She glanced at the clock and hurried out.

explanationZhTw: 「rival」是競爭對手；在這裡指坐在對面的對手。
generatedExample: Our biggest rival opened a new store across the street.

explanationZhTw: 「cubicle」是隔間或小工作間；這裡特別指辦公室裡對面的隔間。
generatedExample: My desk is in the cubicle opposite the printer.

explanationZhTw: 「with certainty」表示非常確定地；這裡強調他幾乎肯定對方也在做同一件事。
generatedExample: She said with certainty that the meeting was at noon.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的「job」不是工作職位，而是任務、要做的事情。整個片語表示「同一個任務」。
generatedExample: We were assigned the same job on the project.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的「adopted」不是「領養」，而是「被採用、被選定」。
generatedExample: The committee adopted the new policy after a long debate.

explanationZhTw: 「profound conviction」表示非常深的信念或強烈的確信。
generatedExample: He spoke with profound conviction about the need for change.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的「fact」有刻意製造出的「既成事實」意味，不只是一般的「事實」。
generatedExample: After the announcement, the rumor became a fact in everyone’s mind.

explanationZhTw: 「It struck him as ...」表示「他覺得……」，是帶有突然感受的說法。
generatedExample: It struck me as strange that no one answered the phone.

explanationZhTw: 「forgery」指偽造、假造的文件或作品；這裡是指編造出來的紀錄。
generatedExample: The museum discovered that the painting was a forgery.

explanationZhTw: 「authentically」表示真實地、可信地；這裡是指他會像真正歷史人物一樣被當成真的。
generatedExample: The story was told so authentically that everyone believed it.
